title: STAR WARS™: Rogue Squadron 3D

notes: Out of the box the game doesn't work on Proton with WineD3D (DX7), only a black screen in main menu after the intro video. I copied dgVoodoo2 files, set ddraw to native with protontricks GAMEID winecfg and then the game started to work with DXVK (DX7 - DX9 - Vulkan), main menu is visible and you can start a game, but after the mission video, the game crashes again.
title: STAR WARS™: Rogue Squadron 3D

Then pressing enter the game exits.

notes:
The main menu doesn't render (just black screen). However pressing enter twice (press enter wait for sound fx, then press enter again) brings up the level select menu and game can be played "normally" from there.

Launch options use : -s 3 -f 4 -l 4
